subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Verily these epistles, both verse and prose, are through divine confirmation and inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حقا که این رسائل منظومه و رساله منثوره بتایید و الهامست نه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of words; of speech
